threading.c(3) Library Functions Manual threading.c(3)

NAME

threading.c - Threading abstraction for WASM/Emscripten using pthreads.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int mutex_init (mutex_t *mutex, const char *name)
Initialize a mutex with a name. int mutex_destroy (mutex_t *mutex)
Destroy a mutex. int mutex_lock_impl (mutex_t *mutex)
Lock a mutex (implementation function). int mutex_trylock_impl (mutex_t *mutex)
Try to lock a mutex without blocking (implementation function). int mutex_unlock_impl (mutex_t *mutex)
Unlock a mutex (implementation function). int asciichat_thread_create (asciichat_thread_t *thread, const char *name, void *(*start_routine)(void *), void *arg)
Create a new named thread. int asciichat_thread_join (asciichat_thread_t *thread, void **retval)
Wait for a thread to complete (blocking). int asciichat_thread_detach (asciichat_thread_t *thread)
asciichat_thread_t asciichat_thread_self (void)
Get the current thread's ID. int asciichat_thread_equal (asciichat_thread_t t1, asciichat_thread_t t2)
Compare two thread IDs for equality. int rwlock_init (rwlock_t *rwlock, const char *name)
Initialize a read-write lock with a name. int rwlock_rdlock_impl (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Acquire a read lock (implementation function). int rwlock_wrlock_impl (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Acquire a write lock (implementation function). int rwlock_rdunlock_impl (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Release a read lock (implementation function). int rwlock_wrunlock_impl (rwlock_t *rwlock)
Release a write lock (implementation function). uintptr_t asciichat_thread_to_key (asciichat_thread_t thread)
Convert a thread handle to a registry key. uint64_t asciichat_thread_current_id (void)
Get the current thread's unique numeric ID. int ascii_tls_key_create (tls_key_t *key, void(*destructor)(void *))
Create a thread-local storage key. int ascii_tls_key_delete (tls_key_t key)
Delete a thread-local storage key. void * ascii_tls_get (tls_key_t key)
Get thread-local value for a key. int ascii_tls_set (tls_key_t key, void *value)
Set thread-local value for a key.

Detailed Description

Threading abstraction for WASM/Emscripten using pthreads.

Definition in file threading.c.

Function Documentation

int asciichat_thread_detach (asciichat_thread_t * thread)

Definition at line 52 of file threading.c.

52                                                         {
53   return pthread_detach(*thread);
54 }
